title: TwentyTwo Modpack
description: A lightweight modpack made by Quellerz and Art112st for TwentyTwo minecraft server.

# Description

**TwentyTwo Modpack** is a lightweight performace-focused Minecaft modpack made for players of TwentyTwo Minecraft server.

It enhances the vanilla experience with QoL improvements, well configured optimizations, and beautiful graphics of Distant Horizons mod keeping gameplay fast and smooth on any device. It contains just the essentials you need to enjoy the game.

# FPS benchmark
- ## Machine 1
  **Machine info:**
  | Component        | Specification                                  |
  | :--------------: | :--------------------------------------------: |
  | CPU              | AMD Ryzen 7 5800H                              |
  | GPU              | Radeon Vega Series / Radeon Vega Mobile Series |
  | Allocated RAM    | 4GB / 32GB                                     |
  | OS               | Devuan GNU/Linux 6 (excalibur)                 |
  
  **FPS Benchmark:**
  | Vsync            | Avg. FPS         | Min. FPS         | Max. FPS         |
  | :--------------: | :--------------: | :--------------: | :--------------: |
  | Adaptive         | 108              | 85               | 117              |
  | Off              | 111              | 94               | 122              |
